title: Thoongaa Kandal Lyrics Maya

thoonga kangal yengum unnaal

oonaa uyira rendum ondru
ondril ondrai urugum nenjam
nenjil needhaan theeraai neeyo

mugathinai moodaamal
agathinai thaa
virumbinen vaazha
thirumbi neeyum vaa
kaadhal maari oodal aagi
kaanal aanaai niyayama

pon vidiyalai unnil kanden
podhum endrum
thoora vaanthai kannil konden
kaalam urugum munn
vaanam viriyum tharunam
siragugalai virikkum

baarathil naalum neelum
kanavugalil karainthu
pogaiyil aagayam
moodinaal thaanduveno
aagayam thaan ellaiyo
nee vaa

thoonga kangal yengum unnaal
neengum unnaal thengum kanneer
thuliyil needhaan neeraai neeyo

oonaa uyira rendum ondru
ondril ondrai urugum nenjam
nenjil needhaan theeraai neeyo

agathinai moodaamal
mugathinai thaaraai
thirumbinen vaazha
virumbi neeyum vaa

kaayam maara naanum neeyum
koodal aanaal sogam theerum
oodal aagi kaadhal maari
thoonga kangal thoonguma

seo.title: Thoongaa Kandal Lyrics Maya

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Thoongaa Kandal'?

The song conveys deep emotions of love and longing, reflecting the complexities of relationships.

What is the plot context of the movie 'Maya'?

'Maya' is a horror thriller that explores themes of love and supernatural elements, making the song's emotional depth even more poignant.

Who is the singer of 'Thoongaa Kandal'?

The song is sung by the talented Shakthisree Gopalan.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for 'Thoongaa Kandal' was composed by Ron Ethan Yohann.

When was 'Thoongaa Kandal' released?

The song was released on July 13, 2015.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In 'Thoongaa Kandal', the protagonist expresses profound feelings of love and yearning, encapsulated in a haunting melody. The song serves as a pivotal moment in the movie Maya, enhancing the emotional narrative of the characters. With its soothing composition and heartfelt lyrics, it evokes a sense of nostalgia and longing. The collaboration between Shakthisree Gopalan and Ron Ethan Yohann brings a unique charm to this beautiful track.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Thoongaa Kandal from the movie Maya is a mesmerizing melody that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. Shakthisree Gopalan's soulful voice combined with Ron Ethan Yohann's enchanting composition creates an unforgettable listening experience. Dive into the emotional depths of this song that resonates with anyone who has ever felt the pangs of love.
stanzaMeanings: Close your eyes, everywhere you are, you are there. In the tears that flow, are you the water?
Both our lives are one, in one heart, does the heart melt? Are you the solution in my heart?
Without closing the face, I desire the inner self. Come back to live, love has changed, and you are the reason.
I saw the golden dawn in you, always. In my eyes, I saw the time melting, the sky opening up, the youth spreading wings.
In the world, day and night, dreams are fading away. If the sky is closed, should I break through? Is the sky the limit? You come.
Close your eyes, everywhere you are, you are there. In the tears that flow, are you the water?
Both our lives are one, in one heart, does the heart melt? Are you the solution in my heart?
Without closing the inner self, I turn back to the face. Come back to live, I desire you.
If we unite, both you and I, the sorrow will end. Love has changed, and will our closed eyes sleep?
